title: Deterministic response scenarios (data-driven + magic keys)
statement: Scenario resolution is deterministic and documented. Data-driven: a well-formed identifier present in the database yields 200; absent yields 404; a malformed required param yields 400. Reserved magic keys in mock.scenario_key force 402/500 (and cpf_usuario=00000000000 forces 401). Resolution order is fixed: auth (401) → forced scenario_key → data-driven. The reserved sentinels in scenarios.md are stable and never collide with generated data.
rationale: pec/teat rely on being able to trigger each status deterministically in integration tests. The sentinels are part of the contract and must remain stable and collision-free.
